name: mercs2-ide-vendor
description: One-time bundling step: CodeMirror 6 + luaparse -> src/lib/vendor.js (committed). Not needed to build or use the IDE.

scripts.build: esbuild entry.js --bundle --minify --format=iife --global-name=CM --outfile=../../src/lib/vendor.js --banner:js="/* vendor.js -- GENERATED by tools/vendor (npm run build). CodeMirror 6 + luaparse, exposed as window.CM. Do not edit. */"
